description_long: This is a large, dark gray Chevrolet Suburban-style minivan with a robust, boxy body and a long wheelbase, designed for urban and suburban transport. The vehicle features four side doors, with two on each side, and a rear hatch door, all with flush, integrated handles. The front end displays a prominent Chevrolet bowtie emblem on a black grille, flanked by rectangular headlights and yellow turn signals. The windows are tinted and span the length of the vehicle, with a large windshield and rear window, and smaller, squared side windows. The wheels are standard steel rims with visible lug nuts, and the tires are thick, suitable for city and light off-road use. The exterior is primarily composed of painted metal panels, with plastic trim around the bumpers and wheel arches.
description: A large, dark gray Chevrolet minivan with a boxy shape, tinted windows, and four side doors, designed for urban transport. It features a prominent front grille, steel wheels, and a long, spacious body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, tinted windows, and the full length of the minivan.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Chevrolet grille, headlights, and windshield.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, two doors, and the rear hatch outline.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail lights, rear window, and hatch door.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two front side windows, two rear side windows, and a large rear window; all windows are rectangular with slight curvature at the corners.
